SEARCH
Package io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.BukkitListeners

Class GlideSafetyListener

java.lang.Object
io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.BukkitListeners.GlideSafetyListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class GlideSafetyListener extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
Listener + state holder for GlideEffect (effects-api-ADR-001).

Responsibilities:

  • Track currently-gliding players and their per-effect settings.
  • Cancel premature EntityToggleGlideEvents until the player is actually above ground/liquid (mirrors the legacy RTP_Glide addon behaviour).
  • Suppress firework-rocket use during the glide window when allowFireworks=false.
  • Fire PlayerLandEvent with the appropriate reason on every exit path (grounded, timeout, disconnect, shutdown).
  • On plugin disable, place still-gliding players at the highest safe block below them (or synthesize a platform).
S-004: every exit path fires PlayerLandEvent or logs via the plugin logger; failures are not swallowed silently. S-005: shutdown column scan only inspects already-loaded chunks; any chunk that is unloaded is logged and skipped.

    • caller

  • Constructor Details

    • GlideSafetyListener

  • Method Details

    • isGliding

      public static boolean isGliding(UUID playerId)

    • getState

      public static GlideSafetyListener.GlideState getState(UUID playerId)

    • register

      public static void register(GlideSafetyListener.GlideState state)

    • endGlide

      public static void endGlide(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, PlayerLandEvent.Reason reason)
      End the glide for the given player, firing PlayerLandEvent with reason and cancelling any pending watchdog. Idempotent.

    • onGlideToggle

      public void onGlideToggle(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityToggleGlideEvent event)
      Mirror of the legacy RTP_Glide OnGlideToggle: cancel premature stop-gliding events until the player is actually above a solid/liquid block. When ground is detected, finalize the glide.

    • onPlayerInteract

      public void onPlayerInteract(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerInteractEvent event)
      Suppress firework-rocket use when the glider's effect was configured with allowFireworks=false. Cancel silently — no chat spam.

    • onQuit

      public void onQuit(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerQuitEvent event)

    • placeAllOnShutdown

      public void placeAllOnShutdown()
      Place every still-gliding player on the highest safe block in the column below them, or synthesize an emergency 3×3 platform on top of the first non-air block when no safe block exists. Called from EffectsAPI.disable (and may be called manually for tests).

      Bounded: O(gliders × worldHeight). Reads only already-loaded chunks (S-005). Failures are logged via the plugin logger (S-004).
